summary: Pure computeCoverage correct (div-by-zero guarded, deduped, unmatched excluded, no data fallbacks); 7/7 tests green; ui-map.json coherent. 2 WARN (stale doc paths, baseURL fails-open to dev port), 2 INFO.

findings.claim: Header docstrings reference stale directory e2e/coverage; files live in e2e/report
findings.evidence: Lines 7/19 say 'node e2e/coverage/collect-coverage.js' and 'e2e/coverage/*'; ui-coverage.test.js:7 says 'node --test e2e/coverage/ui-coverage.test.js'. Actual path is e2e/report/. Copy-pasted commands fail.
findings.fix: Replace e2e/coverage with e2e/report in the doc comments.

findings.claim: baseURL defaults to the dev frontend port the file's own header forbids targeting
findings.evidence: baseURL: PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL || FRONTEND_URL || 'http://localhost:3002'. The header + live-UAT hazard (281 junk rows in dev DB) mandate NEVER hitting dev; with no env set the runner aims at dev:3002. Config fails open instead of closed.
findings.fix: throw if neither PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL nor FRONTEND_URL is set rather than defaulting to the dev port.

findings.claim: Branding assertions are vacuous as authored (always pass)
findings.evidence: getComputedStyle().backgroundColor returns rgb(), so bg.startsWith('#') is false, the ternary substitutes the expected BRAND token, and expect([...]).toContain(BRAND.x) is trivially true. Same pattern in day-view.spec.js:55 and settings-panel.spec.js:50. In-code comment admits it is a placeholder.
findings.fix: REFER to zoe/telly: convert rgb->hex in a real helper and assert the actual computed color before the suite is greenlit.

findings.claim: Module-level /g regex shares lastIndex across files; safe now, fragile to a future break
findings.evidence: COVERS_RE = /.../g at line 36 is reused via .exec in a while loop per file. Each loop currently runs to exhaustion (resets lastIndex), so it is correct today; adding a break would carry stale lastIndex into the next file and skip its leading annotations.
findings.fix: Reset COVERS_RE.lastIndex=0 per file, or use String.matchAll / a fresh regex per file.

refers.why: Branding assertions in the 3 spec scaffolds pass vacuously (test-truthfulness) — harden before the suite runs.
Branding assertion authoring: real rgb->hex helper needed for the spec scaffolds.
